Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 52 -1 0 0}Hm...? That door... I don't believe it was there before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1067 0 0}Hey... Doesn't it look like one of those doors we find sometimes when we're exploring?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 31 52 -1 0 0}It does seem similar to those... Oh, but wait! This one looks like it leads to somewhere deeper than the others.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 31 52 -1 0 0}I'm sensing strong Shadows, treasure chests, and... something else. I'm not sure what it is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}So in other words, it's a great place to test how strong we really are![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}How is that what you got out of what she said?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}It does sound like we might be able to find some good stuff in there, so it could be worth exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}It seems like you can enter and exit this one as much as you want, so keep that in mind if you do decide to go through it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Of course, deciding whether or not to use this door is up to you, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
